extraction.one_line_summary: BØHWAL Casper won sprint after DSM's BENOOT lead-out perfectly timed the slight right-hand bend 200m out, while earlier TREK caused echelon splits before first intermediate sprint.
tactical_patterns: TREK-Segafredo forced echelon splits before first intermediate sprint despite light wind, putting KREISWEG in difficulty early
DSM's BENOOT delayed final lead-out until after final right-hand bend 200m out, neutralizing earlier positioning by rivals
MATTHEWS accumulated race lead through intermediate sprint bonuses (2nd at both sprints) rather than stage wins, leap-frogging BENNETT

rider_signals.MATTHEWS Michael: positive: aggressively hunted bonus seconds at both intermediate sprints to steal yellow from BENNETT without winning stage
rider_signals.KREISWEG Steven: negative: caught out by TREK's echelon forcing before first intermediate sprint despite being GC contender
rider_signals.PEDERSEN Mads: negative: appeared over-geared when BØHWAL accelerated, couldn't respond despite good lead-out positioning
rider_signals.BENOOT Tiesj: positive: perfectly calibrated DSM lead-out delay, hitting front only after final corner negated other teams' earlier positioning
